blocks.content: He smiled. Like he'd just decided something.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Aight, Larry. I'll figure it out.
He bumped Larry's shoulder going past — deliberate, just short of a shove. A few people glanced over.
At the end of the hall, Jonathan was standing with a group. He'd seen it. He waited until Larry got close.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: He's a sophomore. He does that to everyone new. You didn't have to feed him.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I wasn't gonna just stand there.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Sometimes standing there is the move. Now he's got a reason to clock you.
